file_changes: style(qrcode): use dark background and white QR dots in cinema mode
- Updated the new tab cinema mode template in ui.js to have a deep space dark background (#090d16) and a dark card background (#111827) for high-contrast viewing.
- Applied an invert filter on the QR image to render the transparent black dots as crisp white dots for maximum scanability on dark backgrounds.
